stemHtml: After departure from a controlled aerodrome, you are flying IFR in Class E airspace. If you wish to change frequency, which of the following is correct?

options.a: You ask ATC for clearance to change frequency.
options.b: You change frequency without informing ATC because coordination is automatic.
options.c: You inform ATC that you are changing frequency.
options.d: You may change frequency freely without any notification.
